content: Hi, I'm CosmoLab AI. Let's run an R&D discovery session for your OTC drug product. What are we formulating?
A 1% hydrocortisone anti-itch cream — FDA OTC External Analgesic monograph.
Lightweight cream, fast-absorbing, for insect bites and minor skin irritations.
Fragrance-free, alcohol-free, no lanolin. Suitable for sensitive skin.
ICH Q1A accelerated (40°C/75% RH) and long-term (25°C/60% RH) for 24 months. API assay, degradants, pH, viscosity.
Monograph vs NDA pathway and timeline?
Monograph pathway. Target first batch in 12 weeks.
I have everything I need. Type 'generate' to create your documents.
